antagonist_dossier_integration.emotional_drive_excerpt: Kordr wants courage to end in helplessness and love to become a liability. He wants brave people to conclude bravery was foolish.
antagonist_dossier_integration.current_agenda_excerpt: Keep Soreheim Proper workable through the obligations of berserker while managing the immediate pressure of quota demands in Soreheim Alliance.
antagonist_dossier_integration.hidden_pressure_excerpt: Must keep readiness, command cohesion, and physical security aligned even when politics or scarcity push against discipline. Around Soreheim Proper, that usually means carrying quota demands, political rivalry, foreign pressure without letting the role of berserker visibly slip.
antagonist_dossier_integration.effect_on_society_excerpt: He infects heroism itself. Veterans overtrain children, songs end before the heroic verse, and settlements surrender faster than honor once allowed.
